summary: Backend = openspec via /kbd-apply. 17 changes in 5 waves, per-change model routing (frontier Opus 4.8 for core/sync/rust/ai/a2ui; medium Sonnet for solid/lit/htmx; small Haiku for electricsql-extract/alpine). First change: v3-monorepo-and-tooling. Execute is orchestration only — no code written. Five approval gates recorded; greenfield Rust/Dart changes are toolchain-gated (mark BLOCKED if cargo/flutter absent — the pure-Node framework chain Waves 1-3-minus-rust-cli is fully achievable without them).
approval_gates: BRANCH GATE: cut feat/v3-universal-platform-evolution before any apply
BREAKING-CHANGE GATE: v3-core-extraction is semver MAJOR (3.0.0); ship as re-export shim, no consumer break
GREENFIELD-LANGUAGE GATE: rust-cli/mcp/a2a/tauri need cargo; flutter needs dart — confirm toolchains or mark BLOCKED
TURBOREPO-NOW GATE: confirm adopting Turborepo in Wave 1
RELEASE-SHIM GATE: confirm v3.0.0 ships as the re-export shim
verification: TS/JS: pnpm typecheck + test per package via turbo
Rust: cargo build/test + clippy -D warnings (<=500-line files)
Flutter: dart analyze + flutter test + build_runner
reflection_handoff: Consume per-change DONE/BLOCKED; whether the core re-export shim held consumers harmless; CRDT default-on benchmark (Yjs vs Loro @10k); which greenfield targets shipped vs toolchain-blocked; per-package Changesets version state.
recommended_next_step: Cut branch, confirm Turborepo + release-shim gates, then /kbd-apply v3-monorepo-and-tooling
